lines.ja: VOCAL:Hatsune Miku V4 (English)
Tell me what I see
Paint a vivid scene
Taste and feel, no disbelief
Balancing your dreams
And your favorite themes
With the real world underneath
You know, I know it hurts sometimes
Stretched to the limit of our daily lives
To just set aside a few hours of our time, time, time
But just before we say good night
I'll capture the essence of things we like
And weave 'em all together, make a piece of paradise
Cuz I'm making room for a fantasy
I wonder if you slept right next to me
Our dreams would collide and intertwine
No nightmares, just how things ought to be
Never wished for anything
But I'd take every chance you'd give to me
To stay by your side, through darkness and light
So I'll dream
Take a memory
Scale it up, fullscreen
It'd be strange if one day it were deleted
What-ifs and maybes
What's the point of these
When we don't learn a thing from second guessing?
(Hindsight is hardly 20/20)
I know it's hard to recognize
The vibrance of magic under pale blue skies
And sunset is bleeding red and yellow, lilac dyes
(Dyes, dyes) Woah
I know you hate to say goodbyes
But take my hand, I'll show you that we, too, can fly
Tell me all the secrets that you'd like
Cuz I'm making room for a fantasy
I wonder if you slept right next to me
Our dreams would collide and intertwine
No nightmares, just how things ought to be
Never wished for anything
But I'd take every chance you'd give to me
To stay by your side, through darkness and light
So I'll dream
Oh, though ashes always fall after the blaze
A rainbow always shows after it rains
And through the darkest night the sun remains
So trust me, have a little faith
